items.titolo: Broadcom and OpenAI unveil custom-built Jalapeño inference processor — OpenAI's first chip is a massive reticle-sized ASIC built in an ultra-fast nine-month development cycle
items.descrizione: Broadcom and OpenAI reveal their Jalapeño custom-built inference ASIC that allegedly beats existing leading-edge in terms of performance-per-watt.

items.titolo: Microsoft Copilot usato per bloccare StealC e Amadey
items.descrizione: Microsoft ha utilizzato Copilot per scoprire e smantellare l'infrastruttura di Amadey e StealC in collaborazione con Europol e altri partner privati. The post Microsoft Copilot usato per bloccare StealC e Amadey appeared

items.titolo: 48 hours later with the Google Home Speaker, I can't stop talking to Gemini (even if it's imperfect)
items.descrizione: Here's how the new Google Home Speaker has fared against the likes of my Apple HomePod Mini and Echo Dot Max so far.

items.titolo: The Trump White House Is Over Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei
items.descrizione: At high-stakes meetings with the White House, Anthropic's cofounder—a "weirdo," per one official—has been replaced by cofounder Tom Brown.
